problem.title: Final Problem 1
problem.description: This is the first of the final problems to reach our target of 251 problems.

example.explanation: Practice problem — read the description carefully.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Basic Algorithm
solutions.description: This solution uses Kadane's algorithm to find the maximum subarray sum in O(n) time. It maintains a running currentSum and resets it to the current element whenever adding it would decrease the sum. The key insight is that a subarray with a negative sum is never worth extending, so we start fresh from the current element.
